/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g   -Wl,-u,_mysqlrouter_mysqlxmessages_exports  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared -Wl,-soname,libmysqlrouter_mysqlxmessages.so.1 -o ../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlrouter_mysqlxmessages.so.1 CMakeFiles/router_mysqlxmessages.dir/router_mysqlxmessages_dummy.c.o
